journal_entry.description: Revenue recognition for service delivered against customer deposit
journal_entry.rationale: Customer previously paid a $100 deposit which was recorded as a liability (Unearned Revenue or Customer Deposits). Now that the service has been delivered, we recognize the revenue by reducing the liability and increasing revenue. No cash changes hands in this transaction as payment was already received.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Service delivered against prepayment: liability (customer deposit) decreases, revenue increases. No HST impact as tax was collected and recorded when deposit was originally received.

output_credit_classifier.reason: Service delivered against prepayment: liability (customer deposit) decreases, revenue increases. No HST impact as tax was collected and recorded when deposit was originally received.
